data.title: Elon Musk $56B Pay Package Rejected By Judge Again: Tesla Analyst Says 'A Soap Opera Playing Out In Delaware'
data.description: The saga over a 2018 pay package for Elon Musk valued at $56 billion makes headlines again with a Delaware judge again rejecting the plan.

data.title: Cybertruck Turns 1: If You Invested $1,000 In Tesla Stock When EV Truck Was Unveiled, Here's How Much You'd Have Today
data.description: Tesla began deliveries of the Cybertruck one year ago. A look back and calculating the return investors could have made buying TSLA stock.

data.title: NASDAQ-Listed Weed Stock, High Tides Surges Over 21% In Last Two Sessions
data.description: Data from Benzinga Pro shows High Tide Inc. shares experienced a significant surge, gaining over 21% in the last two trading sessions.

data.title: Israel, Hezbollah Trade Strikes In Latest Sign Of Crumbling Ceasefire
data.description: Israel fired rockets at the occupied Shebaa Farms on Monday night, landing in an open area.

data.title: Honeywell Stock Slides After Hours On Updated 2024 Outlook
data.description: Honeywell International Inc (NASDAQ:HON) shares are trading lower in Monday's after-hours session after the company announced a strategic agreement with Bombardier and cut its near-term 2024 outlook.
